mentions.note: Caller asked about fintech; Cramer offered positive view. Note: transcription unclear on exact sentiment level, but phrasing suggests mild-to-moderate buy interest at current levels.
Caller (Jamon, Chicago) asked about CEO conviction and insider selling. Cramer likes Affirm, likes Max Levchin, stock fell way too much at attractive levels. Pull the trigger if under $50.
Terrific quarter: GMV +35%, revenue +33%, strong net income; powerful AI underwriting engine; American consumer showing resilience with steady transactions.
